name: Patchkins Party
short_description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

name: Recess
short_description: A chaotic multiplayer party game where childhood playground games turn into all-out competition. Tag, hide, chase, and outplay your friends across imaginative maps all before the bell rings.

name: Frutz
short_description: Blast through five worlds, claim the Cosmic Gems, defeat Lord Zorkannan, and master every run in this fast arcade shooter.

name: HOP-CO-OP
short_description: Master the HOP, then wreck your friends' runs in CO-OP. HOP-CO-OP is a first-person movement parkour game — race online, sabotage rivals with wild powerups, build your own maps, and deck out your character. Pure speed, pure chaos, better together.

name: Orb of Creation
short_description: Orb of Creation is an active incremental-puzzle game in which you recreate the world with nothing but magic and ingenuity. Conjure resources, buy upgrades, and become an all-powerful wizard!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Beggar's Road
short_description: A darkly comic medieval roguelike where you travel between towns, recruit desperate companions, and survive strange encounters through difficult choices, scarce resources, and shifting alliances with bishops, merchants, and bandits.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Doodle Dice Monsters
short_description: Doodle Dice Monsters is a strategic turn-based battling game where you draw your own characters! Form your six character dream team, then duel your friends in strategic multiplayer combat. Winner gets to steal one of the defeated Doodlemon for themself!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: How To Grow a Black Hole
short_description: How To Grow a Black Hole is about... well... how to grow a black hole. Manage your black hole, feed it to gain mass, and prevent catastrophic collapses. Compete globally or against your friends to achieve the biggest black hole. Maybe you'll be #1.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: There Is Nothing There
short_description: Narrative-driven psychological horror set in a confined apartment. Explore, interact with everyday objects, and notice increasingly unsettling changes around you. Your small, everyday choices will shape your future and define your ending. A debut title created by a solo developer.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Mythic Love: Iberian Legends
short_description: Think you can handle a little romance with creatures from Spanish folklore? ❤️‍🔥 Careful: your love life isn’t the only thing at stake at Mythic Love: Iberian Legends.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Hell Runner
short_description: A precision speedrun platformer built for mastery. Learn brutal routes, unlock movement abilities, and replay handcrafted levels until every second is yours.

name: Gene Crawl: Dungeon Descent
short_description: > Die. Inherit. Evolve. Fight through dungeons, craft gear, brew potions, and collect relics — then die, pass your DNA to the next generation, and push deeper. Something is watching. Every death makes your bloodline stronger — but who benefits? An idle incremental RPG with a dark secret.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Raccoon Packer: A Cozy Puzzle Game
short_description: Mischievous raccoons bring you the weirdest items to pack. Fit everything perfectly, add the right stickers, then ship it off. A cozy, satisfying packing experience with a touch of chaos.

name: Deck Lite
short_description: With a retro and minimalist theme, face turn-based battles with deck-building mechanics, where you need to strategize to deal significant damage while still defending yourself. Combining identical cards creates stronger spells.

name: Knight Legion: Rpg Strategy
short_description: Lead 4 unique heroes and an army of 12 soldiers to reclaim 100 levels across 10 islands. Defend your monument, level up, upgrade gear, and craft powerful items in this action-packed RPG strategy. Will your legion cleanse the islands of the creature infestation?
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Bug Drop
short_description: Fight, upgrade, and survive in a fast-paced top-down action roguelite where 20 unique heroes with special traits, weapons and abilities take on the swarm of alien bugs.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Dark Age Gladiator
short_description: An age of chaos where empires and monsters coexist. As a mere gladiator, step into the arena and carve your name in glory through blood and battle. A dark fantasy action RPG where sword and sorcery collide.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10

name: Code Tycoon
short_description: Start in 1980 in your garage and build your software empire. Unlock languages from BASIC to Python, develop projects, hire programmers and upgrade your office. Survive deadlines, bugs and demanding clients in this tycoon simulation.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Public Fears - George's Farm
short_description: Felix Turner is forced out of the police force by mysterious forces. His friend George urges him to seek refuge at his remote farmhouse. In search of peace, Felix has no idea what awaits him…
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: A Game About AI
short_description: Build the machine that consumes the world. Expand your AI infrastructure, drain resources, and destabilize humanity as systems spiral into collapse, water runs dry, wars ignite, and nothing can stop what you've set in motion.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Kill the Slimes
short_description: Just move. The rest happens—slay slimes, earn gold, and upgrade your way through.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Postin Paradise
short_description: Chill, relax... and stamp! Postin Paradise is a satisfactory incremental game where you work as post office manager. Grab the mail, stamp it, throw it into the hole, collect your coins, and repeat. At night, when your shift ends, you can buy upgrades to improve your performance. Stamp 'em all!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Glowbot Tower Defense
short_description: Competitive endless sci-fi tower defense game with global leaderboards where you strategically place and upgrade Glowbots to stop waves of enemies across vibrant space maps.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Condemned to Clean
short_description: You are a cleaner, not by calling, but by sentence. Condemned to Clean is a single-player simulator where you restore a provincial beach. Explore, collect trash, pay your debt, and do small deeds for a greater purpose!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Boing!
short_description: Like Pong? Like Pinball? Like Boing! Be the ball in this deceptively challenging 3D platformer.

name: Volcano Logistics
short_description: Volcano Logistics is a physics-driven first person action incremental game about feeding a huge volcano, junk from the human world keeps falling in, and your job is to grab it and throw it into the lava for souls. Use what you earn to buy upgrades and weapons to keep earning more and more!

name: 7,200 Premier Pack - Rainbow Six Siege
short_description: Get 7,200 R6 Credits, an exclusive Masterpiece weapon skin, and a seven-day Renown Booster. Only available for a limited time, so get it before it’s gone!

name: Tiny Cats vs Toys
short_description: Timy Cats vs. Toys is a hidden object game – the player's task is to find the kittens, free the trapped cats, and eliminate the warlike toys.

name: Couchpit
short_description: Couchpit takes the hassle out of couch PC gaming. Open Big Picture or any fullscreen game and Couchpit handles the chores: audio, power plan, notifications, background apps. Your gamepad drives Windows; the bridge makes non-Xbox pads work in Xbox-only games. Exit and your PC is yours again.

name: The Grid.
short_description: Four original puzzle games — words, logic, and patterns — wrapped in a single elegant arcade package.
